records.question: Which Square Dancing activities involve female assistant professors named Leslie Hall who work in room 288 of the Krieger building and have phone numbers at least 7332?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT activity.actid FROM activity
JOIN faculty_participates_in ON activity.actid = faculty_participates_in.actid
JOIN faculty ON faculty_participates_in.facid = faculty.facid
WHERE faculty.room = '288' AND faculty.building = 'Krieger' AND activity.activity_name = 'Square Dancing' AND faculty.fname = 'Leslie' AND faculty.rank = 'AsstProf' AND faculty.phone >= 7332 AND faculty.sex = 'F' AND faculty.lname = 'Hall'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT a.actid 
FROM Activity a 
JOIN Faculty_Participates_in fpi ON a.actid = fpi.actid 
JOIN Faculty f ON fpi.FacID = f.FacID 
WHERE a.activity_name = 'Square Dancing' 
AND f.Room = '288' 
AND f.Building = 'Krieger' 
AND f.Fname = 'Leslie' 
AND f.Rank = 'AsstProf' 
AND f.Phone >= '7332' 
AND f.Sex = 'F' 
AND f.Lname = 'Hall'

records.question: Which activities are named Crossword Puzzles?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT activity.actid FROM activity
WHERE activity.activity_name = 'Crossword Puzzles'
records.pred_sql: SELECT actid FROM Activity WHERE activity_name = 'Crossword Puzzles'

records.question: Which activities named exactly 'Football' have both students and faculty participating in them?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT activity.actid FROM activity
JOIN participates_in ON activity.actid = participates_in.actid
JOIN faculty_participates_in ON activity.actid = faculty_participates_in.actid
WHERE activity.activity_name = 'Football'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT a.actid 
FROM Activity a 
JOIN Participates_in p ON a.actid = p.actid 
JOIN Faculty_Participates_in f ON a.actid = f.actid 
WHERE a.activity_name = 'Football' 
GROUP BY a.actid

records.question: Which Soccer activities include female student Sarah Schmidt who has a major of at least 50?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT activity.actid FROM activity
JOIN participates_in ON activity.actid = participates_in.actid
JOIN student ON participates_in.stuid = student.stuid
WHERE student.sex = 'F' AND student.fname = 'Sarah' AND activity.activity_name = 'Soccer' AND student.major >= 50 AND student.lname = 'Schmidt'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT a.actid 
FROM Activity a 
JOIN Participates_in p ON a.actid = p.actid 
JOIN Student s ON p.stuid = s.StuID 
WHERE a.activity_name = 'Soccer' 
  AND s.Sex = 'F' 
  AND s.Fname = 'Sarah' 
  AND s.Major >= 50 
  AND s.LName = 'Schmidt'

records.question: Which activities have the exact name 'Crossword Puzzles' and have both students and faculty participating in them?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT activity.actid FROM activity
JOIN participates_in ON activity.actid = participates_in.actid
JOIN faculty_participates_in ON activity.actid = faculty_participates_in.actid
WHERE activity.activity_name = 'Crossword Puzzles'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Activity.actid
FROM Activity
JOIN Participates_in ON Activity.actid = Participates_in.actid
JOIN Faculty_Participates_in ON Activity.actid = Faculty_Participates_in.actid
WHERE Activity.activity_name = 'Crossword Puzzles'
